examples:
Command Example
!cisco-ise-get-endpoint-id macAddress=00:0E:35:D4:D8:51
Human Readable Output
The endpoint ID is: 327b0120-4ba1-11e8-93bd-000c296ec148
2. Get information for an endpoint
Returns details for a specified endpoint.
Base Command
cisco-ise-get-endpoint-details

!cisco-ise-get-endpoint-id macAddress=00:0E:35:D4:D8:51
Human Readable Output
The endpoint ID is: 327b0120-4ba1-11e8-93bd-000c296ec148
2. Get information for an endpoint
Returns details for a specified endpoint.
Base Command
cisco-ise-get-endpoint-details
Input
name: cisco-ise-get-endpoint-details

outputs.description: Endpoint MAC address. CiscoISE.Endpoint.Group Endpoint group name
outputs.name: CiscoISE.Endpoint.MACAddress

outputs.description: Endpoint ID. Endpoint.MACAddress Endpoint MAC address.
outputs.name: Endpoint.ID

outputs.description: Endpoint custom attributes. CiscoISE.Endpoint.StaticGroupAssignment True if the endpoint has a static group assignment.
outputs.name: CiscoISE.Endpoint.CustomAttributes

outputs.description: Whether the endpoint has a static profile assignment. CiscoISE.Endpoint.User Profile of the user associated with the endpoint.
outputs.name: CiscoISE.Endpoint.StaticProfileAssignment
